short_description: AI-powered content creation and review assistant for marketing teams
domain_summary: Marketing content creation and review process involves multiple stakeholders and tasks. This project aims to automate content creation, review, and approval using multi-agent AI.
user_persona: Marketing Team Lead: Responsible for managing marketing content creation and review process
architecture_notes: Implement API gateway for secure communication between microservices
Use a message broker (e.g., RabbitMQ) for asynchronous communication
backend_modules: Content Creation Agent: Generates marketing content using NLP and machine learning algorithms
Content Review Agent: Reviews generated content for quality and consistency
Approval Agent: Handles approval process for reviewed content
frontend_features: Content Creation Interface: Allows users to input content requirements and generate content
Content Review Interface: Displays reviewed content for approval
data_sources: Marketing Database: Stores marketing content and campaign data
Knowledge Graph: Stores marketing knowledge and best practices
testing_strategy: Unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing using Pytest and Docker
starter_questions: What is the marketing content creation process?
How can we automate content creation and review?
What are the key performance indicators (KPIs) for marketing content?
workflow_steps: Content Creation: Generate marketing content using NLP and machine learning algorithms
Content Review: Review generated content for quality and consistency
Approval: Handle approval process for reviewed content
business_rules: Review agent checks content against marketing best practices

sample_documents.content: Marketing content creation process involves multiple stakeholders and tasks. This document outlines the process and best practices.
This checklist outlines the key points to review when evaluating marketing content for quality and consistency.

tool_catalog.name: BERT
tool_catalog.description: Pre-trained language model for NLP tasks

agent_plan.name: Architecture Agent
agent_plan.role: Define app boundaries, data flow, runtime stack, and integration points.
outputs: Implement API gateway for secure communication between microservices
Use a message broker (e.g., RabbitMQ) for asynchronous communication

agent_plan.name: Backend Agent
agent_plan.role: Design FastAPI modules, service contracts, validation, and error handling.
outputs: Content Creation Agent: Generates marketing content using NLP and machine learning algorithms
Content Review Agent: Reviews generated content for quality and consistency
Approval Agent: Handles approval process for reviewed content

agent_plan.name: Frontend Agent
agent_plan.role: Design React screens, state flow, controls, and user feedback states.
outputs: Content Creation Interface: Allows users to input content requirements and generate content
Content Review Interface: Displays reviewed content for approval

agent_plan.name: Database Agent
agent_plan.role: Design persistence models, sample data, indexes, and audit records.

agent_plan.name: Testing Agent
agent_plan.role: Define contract tests, smoke tests, and generated project validation.
outputs: Unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing using Pytest and Docker

agent_plan.name: DevOps Agent
agent_plan.role: Define environment variables, Docker workflow, and repository packaging.

agent_plan.name: Reviewer Agent
agent_plan.role: Review the generated plan for completeness, security, and portfolio quality.
outputs: Content Creation: Generate marketing content using NLP and machine learning algorithms
Content Review: Review generated content for quality and consistency
Approval: Handle approval process for reviewed content

fallback_reason: OpenAI limit reached. Automatically switched to Groq.
architecture_description: Content Writing Team for multi-agent content drafting.
